steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank separates the verb juxtapose from its direct object, the noun phrase images of African American women with text fragments.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
In Standard English, a verb is never separated from its direct object by punctuation.

Choice D (no punctuation) is correct because juxtapose directly takes images of African American women with text fragments as its object.

Choices A, B, and C all incorrectly insert punctuation marks between the verb and its object.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
